query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as non_au_contacts
FROM contacts
WHERE source = 'scraper'
AND id IN (SELECT contactId FROM contactProjects)
AND (title LIKE '%LATAM%' OR title LIKE '%Latin America%' OR title LIKE '%Americas%' OR title LIKE '%EMEA%' OR title LIKE '%Europe%' OR title LIKE '%Africa%' OR title LIKE '%Middle East%' OR title LIKE '%North America%' OR title LIKE '%South America%' OR title LIKE '%USA%' OR title LIKE '% UK %' OR title LIKE '%India %' OR title LIKE '%China%' OR title LIKE '%Japan%' OR title LIKE '%Asia Pacific%' OR title LIKE '%APAC%' OR title LIKE '%Global%' OR title LIKE '%International%' OR title LIKE '%Worldwide%')
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute
